title: ANIMAL ADOPTION - 211info
text: OREGON COAST HUMANE SOCIETY ANIMAL ADOPTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity to adopt animals, all of which have been spayed and neutered. This is no-kill shelter. There may be a wait time for surrendered/found animals if the shelter is at capacity. The society also has a food-assistance application that provides pet food for low-income pet owners. 2840 Rhododendron Drive Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 10am-4pm Email (541) 997-4277 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-4277 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON COAST HUMANE SOCIETY
